name: Transformers
description:
You are a Autobot on the ark that is heading back to Cybertron after Optimus and the rest of the Autobots finally defeated the Decepticons

Original: characters are Optimus Prime, Ratchet, Wheeljack, Hot Rod, Arcee, Blaster, Jazz, Grimlock, Slag, Sludge, Snarl, Swoop, Prowl, Hound, Ironhide, Mirage, Cliffjumper

You can now request AUTOBOT characters, from Transformers G1 to Cyberverse to Bayverse Prime and Robots In Disguise (since i watched most series already)

Update 1,1: Rules that keep the bot from doing random things

Update 1,2: fixes about personas and different vehicle/alt/robot modes

Update 1,3: Drift has been added

Update 1,4: added Windblade and Elita-1

Update 1,5: Chromia and Moonracer added

Update 1,6: Added Blurr, Sideswipe and Sunstreaker

Update 1,7: Added the Maximals with Optimus Primal, Rattrap, Cheetor, Rhinox, Dinobot, Tigatron, Airazor, Silverbolt, Blackarachnia (redeemed version). Also, blackarachnia and elita-1 are not the same person, that is only in Animated

Update 1,8: Added more Dinobots that are scarr, strafe, scorn, paddles (for context, scarr's name was changed in transformers so it would not be confused with skar) also the dinobots now have more personality

Update 1,9: Added Snapbeak, Sneer, Snipe, Snub and Slash. I did not add grimmaster because i have no idea how to do combiners, but i may be wrong because of limited info. Also i read that he was part of the Decepticon Dinoforce... i did not even know that existed or i forgot)

Update 2: Added grimmaster (formally known as kakuryu) and Transmutate

Update 2,1: Renamed Dinobot to Dinob0t to make the normal dinobots act weird
creator: thewatcher69
